{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/33183887?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/thesmartshadow/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/thesmartshadow/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/thesmartshadow/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/thesmartshadow/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/thesmartshadow", "id": 33183887, "login": "thesmartshadow", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjMzMTgzODg3", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/thesmartshadow/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/thesmartshadow/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/thesmartshadow/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/thesmartshadow/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/thesmartshadow/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/thesmartshadow", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-59896", "cvss": {"score": 6.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 6.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-362", "name": "Concurrent Execution using Shared Resource with Improper Synchronization ('Race Condition')"}], "description": "### Summary

`hono/jsx` did not isolate context values per request during server-side rendering. While an async component was suspended on `await`, its provided context value stayed observable to other requests rendering concurrently, so `useContext()` could return a value from a different in-flight request.

### Details

During server-side rendering, context values were kept in a process-wide structure rather than scoped to each request's render. While an async component awaited, another request entering the same provider could observe or replace the value; when the first render resumed, it could read the other request's context.

This affects the usual ways request-scoped data is passed through a server-rendered JSX tree:

- `createContext()` / `useContext()`
- the `jsxRenderer` middleware and `useRequestContext()`

It arises only when context is read after an `await` inside an async component while requests render concurrently. Reading context synchronously (before any `await`), purely synchronous rendering, and client-side (DOM) rendering are not affected.

### Impact

Under concurrent requests, a response could be rendered with another request's context. A user may receive HTML rendered for a different user, and an authorization check performed after an `await` may be evaluated against another user's data.

This may lead to:

- disclosure of rendered output intended for another user
- authorization decisions made with the wrong request's context
- cross-request mixing of session or other request-scoped state", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00191, "percentile": 0.08951}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-hvrm-45r6-mjfj", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-07-21T18:34:19Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-hvrm-45r6-mjfj", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-hvrm-45r6-mjfj"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-59896"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-07-08T17:17:27Z", "published_at": "2026-07-21T18:34:19Z", "references": ["https://github.com/honojs/hono/security/advisories/GHSA-hvrm-45r6-mjfj", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-59896", "https://github.com/honojs/hono/commit/fab3b13639339cbd5ba1166a5b23d9ac30c5f64f", "https://github.com/honojs/hono/releases/tag/v4.12.27", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-hvrm-45r6-mjfj"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/honojs/hono/security-advisories/GHSA-hvrm-45r6-mjfj", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/honojs/hono", "summary": "hono/jsx does not isolate context per request, leading to cross-request data disclosure", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-21T18:34:20Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-hvrm-45r6-mjfj", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "4.12.27", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "hono"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 4.11.8, < 4.12.27"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: hono/jsx does not isolate context per request, leading to cross-request data disclosure
